tagline: Genie, the Databricks AI experience for business users, has been renamed to Genie One.
what_it_does: Genie, the Databricks AI experience for business users, has been renamed to Genie One. The feature and its capabilities are unchanged. Genie One is the simplified Databricks UI for business users, a single entry point for interacting with data and AI without navigating technical concepts like compute, queries, models, or notebooks.
why_it_matters: Genie One enables users to: View and interact with AI/BI dashboards to track key performance indicators (KPIs) and analyze metrics.
key_takeaway: Genie, the Databricks AI experience for business users, has been renamed to Genie One.
